name: synth_mock_monkeypatch_setattr_0198
description: Uses monkeypatch to replace validate_ast with a lambda returning True

def test_{task}(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr('parser.validate_ast', lambda *a, **kw: True)
    result = run_{task}()
    assert result.success
